x-enumeration-literals.name: Investigation & Verification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Investigates the transaction to verify legitimacy, supporting documentation, and compliance with card network or bank rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fund Reversal Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reverses the transaction amount from the merchants account and credits it back to the customers account if the claim is valid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Communication & Notification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Notifies all parties involved (customer, merchant, acquiring bank, issuing bank) about the status of the chargeback.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance & Reporting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures adherence to card network rules, banking regulations, and internal policies.
Maintains a record for auditing and reporting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Resolution & Recovery Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides a mechanism for appeals or recovery if the initial chargeback is disputed by the merchant.
